title: dianthus brevipetalus
intro: Dianthus brevipetalus, also known as the short-petaled pink, is a plant species in the carnation family that is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dianthus brevipetalus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and promote wound healing. Dianthus brevipetalus can be prepared as a tea or dried herb for oral consumption, or it can be made into a topical paste or ointment for external use.
